title: Business Split Payments Config
description: Business-level configuration for split payments. Declaring the capability means multiple payment instruments are supported; this config declares which combinations are valid.

allowed_combinations.description: Array of valid instrument combinations. Each combination is an array of instrument groups. A payment is valid if it matches any combination.

items.description: A single valid combination: an array of instrument groups that together define the constraints. All groups must be satisfied (AND logic).
